title: UHC Essentials
description: This texture pack, UHC Essentials, will help you climb the ranks in UHC!
body: An **UHC TexturePack** to up your game in UHC! Here’s what it changes: * Low Fire * Low Shield * Bow & Crossbow charging indicator * Non-obstructive Particles + No particles in blocks * The "Golden Head", is literally a head [CIT RESEWN REQUIRED] * Visible Ores [CEM REQUIRED] * Clean water This pack is designed to enhance your performance in UHC by providing **clearer visuals** and **better timing cues**. The low fire and shield make it easier to see your surroundings. Non-obstructive particles keep your view clean, and the Golden Head helps distinguish it from the regular Gapples in Shieldless. The clean water makes you easier to see underwater, and the visible ores add glow to the ores so you can see them more easily! Download it now to gain a tactical advantage and excel in your UHC gameplay!
